summary: P1.4: web apply.ts — copy model+prompt_version from parent row when spawning reassigned-tag; update parity harness fixture+compare to assert these columns

resolution.note: Web apply.ts + db.ts read+write provenance; reassign-spawn inherits parent's model/prompt_version. CLI review_tags.py reassign branch updated symmetrically. Parity harness fixture seeded with provenance, compare.py asserts equivalence on (model, prompt_version). Schema.ts gets the partial UNIQUE for fresh-boot/shadow case. 53 unit tests + parity harness green.
